const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});

text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73279523 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":10000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73279523 --event evt-petition-disposition && rg --files data/cases/scotus/73279523 | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"env | sort | rg '^(COURT|DOCKET|EVENT|PREDICTOR|RUN|MODEL|DECIDED|FEDCOURTS|CELL|RECORD|SNAPSHOT|HOME|PWD)=' || true\nfind . -path '*/record/context.json' -o -path '*/record/documents.json' -o -path '*/record/snapshot*' | sort | head -200\nfind /tmp -path '*/record/context.json' -o -path '*/record/documents.json' -o -path '*/record/snapshot*' | sort | head -200","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_toke

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' data/cases/scotus/73279523/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml
sed -n '1,360p' data/cases/scotus/73279523/record/snapshots/2026-07-16.json

if [ -f data/cases/scotus/73279523/record/documents.json ]; then sed -n '1,300p' data/cases/scotus/73279523/record/documents.json; fi
find data/cases/scotus/73279523/record/documents -maxdepth 1 -type f -print 2>/dev/null | sort

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' data/cases/scotus/73279523/record/documents/documents.json\nwc -l -w -c data/cases/scotus/73279523/record/documents/*.txt\nsed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73279523/record/documents/questions-presented.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|search.*web|web search|fedcourts|mcp/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description));

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n 'Modern discretionary-cert|Segment base rate by salience|By relist|Relist|CVSG|Sixth|6th|2025 Term|Term 2025|paid|Paid' metrics/statpack.md | head -120\nsed -n '1,260p' metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.. | objects | select(has(\"salience_band\") or has(\"fee_class\"))' metrics/statpack.json | head -200","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --era 2020s --citation '594 U.S. 413' --limit 8 --corpus-backend ranged","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"uninjured class members\" certification TransUnion",filed_after:"2021-06-24",court:["scotus","ca1","ca2","ca4","ca5","ca6","ca7","ca8","ca9","ca11","cadc"],order_by:"score desc",num_results:8,fields:["absolute_url","caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","snippet"]});
for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); else if (c.type === "image") image(c); }

for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); else if (c.type === "image") image(c); }

for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); else if (c.type === "image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"find data/cases/scotus/73279523/record -maxdepth 2 -type f -print | sort\njq '.terms[] | select(.term == \"2025\" or .year == 2025)' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq '.terms | type, keys, .[0]?' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);
